narrative:
Columbia E (precinct in Hamilton County) has 315 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 31.1%, a clear Democratic lean of 9.8 percentage points.
